---
name: New source suggestion
about: Suggest a new source organization to index in the Renaissance Hub
title: "[New source] "
labels: ["new-source"]
---

## Source

**Canonical name:** <!-- e.g. "NWEA Research", "TNTP", "Annenberg Institute" -->

**Homepage URL:** <!-- https://... -->

**Example publication URL:** <!-- A specific paper/report URL from this source so the maintainer can spot-check format -->

## Why in scope

<!--
1–2 sentences. The inclusion criteria are in meta/inclusion-criteria.md.
A qualifying source has (a) editorial accountability, (b) public access,
(c) relevance to evidence-based K-12 / higher-ed / learning engineering.
-->

## Optional

- **Initial pass size:** <!-- default 30. Don't request >50; backlog-prompt.md handles larger batches once a source is onboarded. -->
- **Priority guess:** <!-- high / medium / low -->
- **Notes:** <!-- known access quirks, related sources, urgency, anything else useful -->

---

*A maintainer will review for scope. If approved, they'll run `meta/new-source-prompt.md` against this source. If not, they'll close the issue with a comment explaining why.*
